About the Project

Shades Evara

Shades Evara is a premium residential development offering thoughtfully designed 2.5 & 3 BHK luxury apartments on Faizabad Road, one of Lucknow's most sought-after and rapidly growing corridors.

Every apartment at Shades Evara is crafted for the discerning home-buyer — featuring fully air-conditioned modular kitchens, premium vitrified flooring, branded UPVC windows, and high-quality fittings throughout.

The project blends lifestyle amenities with green, open living — offering a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, and lush landscaped surroundings within a secure, gated community with 24×7 surveillance.

Priced competitively at ₹6,500 per Sq. Ft., Shades Evara is a compelling opportunity for end-users and investors alike in Lucknow's booming real estate market.

Project Type

Luxury Apartments (2.5 & 3 BHK)

Why Choose This Project

Key Highlights

Prime Location

Situated on Faizabad Road — one of Lucknow's fastest-growing corridors, with excellent connectivity to schools, hospitals, malls, and major city landmarks.

2.5 & 3 BHK Luxury Homes

Spacious, premium 2.5 & 3 BHK configurations designed to maximise natural light, ventilation, and comfortable family living.

AC Modular Kitchen

Fully air-conditioned modular kitchens with premium ceramic tile finish and branded UPVC windows — designed for comfort and style.

Club House & Swimming Pool

A premium clubhouse and swimming pool for recreation and leisure — elevating your everyday lifestyle beyond the ordinary.

Gymnasium

A well-equipped gym within the premises so residents can maintain an active, healthy lifestyle without stepping out.

24×7 Security

Round-the-clock security with CCTV surveillance and controlled gated access — giving your family complete peace of mind.

Green Landscapes

Lush landscaped open spaces and green zones within the community — a breath of fresh air amid urban living.

Strong ROI Potential

Priced at ₹6,500/Sq. Ft. in a high-growth corridor — excellent capital appreciation and rental yield potential for investors.

Construction Quality

Specifications

Every detail at Shades Evara is chosen for durability, aesthetics, and lasting comfort.

Living Room

  • WallsPlastic Emulsion Paint
  • FloorVitrified Tiles 600 × 600 mm
  • Main DoorHard Wood Frame with Factory Laminated Flush Panels
  • WindowBranded UPVC with Glass Panels

Bedroom

  • WallsPlastic Emulsion Paint
  • FloorVitrified Tile 600 × 600 mm
  • DoorHard Wood Frame with Factory Laminated Flush Panels
  • WindowBranded UPVC with Glass Panels

Master Bedroom

  • WallsPlastic Emulsion Paint
  • FloorVitrified Tile 600 × 600 mm
  • DoorHard Wood Frame with Factory Laminated Flush Panels
  • WindowBranded UPVC with Glass Panels

Modular Kitchen (with AC)

  • Walls2 Ft Ceramic Tiles above counter & Oil Bound Distemper Paint above
  • FloorCeramic Tiles 300 × 300 mm
  • DoorHard Wood Frame with Factory Laminated Flush Panels
  • WindowBranded UPVC with Glass Panels

Toilets

  • WallsCeramic Tiles 300 × 600 mm & Oil Bound Distemper Paint
  • FloorAnti-Skid Ceramic Tiles 300 × 300 mm
  • DoorHard Wood Frame with Factory Laminated Flush Panels
  • WindowBranded UPVC with Glass Panels
  • FittingsWall Mounted WC, Basins & Branded CP Fittings

Balconies

  • FloorAnti-Skid Ceramic Tiles 300 × 300 mm
  • DoorBranded UPVC with Glass Panes

Lift Lobby

  • Ground FloorGranite Flooring
  • Upper FloorsKota Stone on Staircase & Above Floors

External

  • WallsLong Lasting Weatherproof Exterior Paint

Configuration & Pricing Overview

3 BHK Luxury Apartment ₹6,500 / Sq.ft.
Payment Plan Construction Linked
Site Visit Booking +91 92785 98093

GST, stamp duty, registration charges & all government levies payable extra by the purchaser. Exact carpet area and floor plan details available on request.

Important Notes

  1. Price list is for reference only and may be revised at the sole discretion of the Promoter/Developer without prior notice.
  2. The price of the unit will remain firm once booked.
  3. Drawings and floor plans are conceptual. Area and dimensions may vary within permissible limits and will be confirmed before execution of the sale deed.
  4. Any additional area, construction, or facilities provided beyond those mentioned will be chargeable extra.
  5. Contact Caasaa Paandora at +91 92785 98093 for the detailed payment schedule and floor plan brochure.
